summary: Comprehensive testing of TopoWave tabbed input interface (Locator, Adresse, GPS). All major features working. Added missing data-testid attributes for improved testability.

minor.issue: Intermittent 502 errors when external Open-TopoData API is rate-limited or slow

integration_issues.issue: CORS error when calling Nominatim OpenStreetMap API directly from frontend
integration_issues.details: Browser blocks direct XMLHttpRequest to nominatim.openstreetmap.org due to missing Access-Control-Allow-Origin header. Need to proxy through backend or use JSONP.

issues: Missing aria-describedby attribute for DialogContent (accessibility warning)

passed_tests: Locator tab Station A - accepts valid 6-10 char Maidenhead locators (JN18DQ, JN18DQ96, JN18DQ96AB)
Locator tab Station A - shows validation error for invalid formats
Locator tab Station A - map picker button opens dialog and selects location
GPS tab Station A - lat/lon inputs visible with correct placeholders
GPS tab Station A - converts coordinates to 10-char locator correctly (48.8584, 2.2945 → JN18DU56IA)
GPS tab Station A - validation prevents conversion with invalid coordinates
Address tab Station A - input field visible with placeholder
Locator tab Station B - same functionality as Station A
GPS tab Station B - same functionality as Station A (52.5163, 13.3777 → JO62QM53HV)
Address tab Station B - input field visible with placeholder
Map picker Station A - opens dialog, shows CARTO dark tiles, allows selection
Map picker Station B - opens dialog with correct title 'STATION B'
Profile calculation works with locators entered via Locator tab
Profile calculation works with locators derived from GPS coordinates
Results display correctly: distance (405.15km), azimuth, altitude, status
Terrain profile chart renders correctly with obstruction marker
Path map shows route between stations with obstruction point
All data-testid attributes added for tabs and inputs
action_items: FIX CORS issue for Address geocoding - Proxy Nominatim API calls through backend endpoint
Add aria-describedby to DialogContent components for accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: Address geocoding calls external API directly from frontend which causes CORS errors - should be proxied through backend
Console warnings about missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

success_rate.backend: 80% (12/15 tests passed, 3 failed due to external API rate limiting)
success_rate.frontend: 95% (All features working except Address geocoding CORS)

seed_data_creation: None required - app uses external APIs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tabbed input interface (Locator, Adresse, GPS) fully tested and working. Main issue is CORS for Address tab geocoding - Nominatim API needs to be proxied through backend. GPS conversion and Map picker work perfectly. Added data-testid attributes for all tab components.
